docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY KANG, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SIU, DIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY KOREAN INTERPRETER--TED KIM. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANG, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIU, DIANA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED NOV-20-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIU, DIANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
